MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-04-2020 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER SHENGYANG YU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE AND REDUCED THE AMOUNT TO $225.00 FILING FEE OWED TO THE COURT, WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 3/30/20. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
